closed_findings.resolution: Implemented robust root loader in root.tsx supplying typed google config.
Centralized under unified LoginDialog rendering official Google Sign-In button.
Implemented dedicated, secure backend POST /api/v1/dev-auth/login route guarded against prod environment.
Added google_login rate limiter under framework.yaml and enforced in GoogleCredentialAuthenticator.
Handled failure mapping in GoogleCredentialAuthenticator and redacting all internal raw exception messages.
Refactored AuthenticateWithGoogle to use TransactionManager and Clock atomically.
Implemented unique violation handling in AddFavorite usecase and Dbal upsert.
Implemented precise PATCH semantics in UpdateVisit usecase distinguishing omitted, null, and new values.
Implemented strict date validation Y-m-d format and preventing future date visits.
Enforced Cache-Control: private, no-store and Vary: Cookie headers on all personalization endpoints.
Implemented batch favorite place checks eliminating N+1 DB query issues.
Modified listFavorites and listVisits endpoints to return batched place details.
Described all authentication and personalization endpoints in HealthOpenApiFactory.php, successfully exporting and generating types.
Wrote complete Playwright E2E integration test suite covering the entire user journey.
